positive: Minimalist circular crest design featuring a stylized celestial mountain range at sunset. The mountain silhouette is composed of sharp, overlapping peaks, set against a deep gradient sky of burnt orange, lavender, and gold. A crescent moon and a single, stylized star are incorporated above the peaks. Clean lines, negative space utilization, perfect symmetry, vector style, tattoo flash art aesthetic, high contrast, suitable for apparel printing, centered composition, vibrant yet earthy color palette.
